content.en:
Ye Tian looked around, the dark forbidden area in front of him was still dark, even with his half-step True Ancestor Realm divine sense, it was difficult to detect anything, and the copying talent could only detect gifted creatures, which did not work here.

"Master, the disciple didn't see anything!"

Ye Tian said.

"Of course you can't see it!" Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said with a smile: "You are only half a step in the True Ancestor realm, and if you don't reach the Dao Ancestor realm, you can't find any traces here at all." When I first discovered this, I was already a Dual Heavenly Dao Ancestor. It's a pity that for me in the realm of Dao Ancestors, the opportunity here is useless. "

"Don't resist, I'll take you in for the teacher!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor grabbed Ye Tian, used the power of the Dao Ancestor level, broke through a layer of barriers in the underworld, and came to another small world.

"This is ......"

Ye Tian saw a small world, similar to the Dark Forbidden Domain, but there was a vibrant atmosphere here.

Moreover, there is also a black lake here, in the center of the black lake is a black lotus, the black lotus is about ten meters in diameter, and it is filled with the power of the dark forbidden domain, which brings a great sense of oppression to Ye Tian.

"This is the rare Initial Realm in the Dark Forbidden Realm!"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestral Dao.

"Initial Realm?"

Ye Tian was a little incomprehensible.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor explained: "You should know that the Divine Heaven Realm and our Realm, in fact, our Realm has no name, and no one has named this Realm, because there is no need, if you really want to name it, it can be called the Dao Mountain Realm, after all, Dao Mountain is the pioneer of our realm's cultivation system, this is their due glory! There are many realms in the Dark Forbidden Realm, and they are almost impossible to connect with each other, but how did the realm come about? Could it be that it was born from the beginning? There may be some realms that have been carved out by supreme beings, but most of them are definitely born naturally. After countless years of research, it was discovered that the realm evolved from the initial realm. There are many Initial Realms in the Dark Forbidden Realm, and a very small number of them have the potential to grow, growing until they become a true realm. And this initial realm in front of me belongs to the category that cannot grow, but its value is unimaginable!"

As soon as the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said this, Ye Tian completely understood, and finally understood the value of the Initial Realm.

"Master, wouldn't this Initial Realm be used as a base to build a force similar to the Forbidden Hall here?" Ye Tian asked.

"No!" Void Heaven Dao Ancestor shook his head, "The power of the Dark Forbidden here is not controlled by the Teacher, although staying here is better than the Dark Forbidden Domain, but the True Ancestor can't survive for a long time, he can't even survive, how can he cultivate? Even as a teacher, he can't practice with peace of mind in such an environment, and the world where the Forbidden Hall is located is opened up by the Lord of the Forbidden Palace, and there is no dark forbidden power in it, so he can open up a transcendent force!"

"Master, you said that I should have the power of the dark taboo, what should I do?"

Ye Tian said expectantly.

"Go to that black lotus, sit cross-legged on the black lotus, swallow a lotus seed, and then withstand the invasion of the dark forbidden power of the forbidden lake, as long as you can bear it, you can transform a body of divine power into dark forbidden divine power. In this way, once you become a True Ancestor, your True Ancestor's power is equivalent to possessing the Dark Forbidden Attribute, and the power is at least several times stronger than the normal True Ancestor's power! Moreover, you also have the hope of cultivating into a Forbidden Body!"

"What is a forbidden body?"

Ye Tian wondered.

"Before, no one knew about the forbidden body, but the Lord of the Forbidden Hall fought with the Daoshan Dao Ancestor countless years ago, and he only fell into the hands of the Daoshan Dao Ancestor in the realm of the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor with the strength of the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and with the forbidden body, the Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor had no way to take him. From that moment on, the secrets of the forbidden body were revealed. Using the power of darkness and taboo to temper the body, a forbidden body will be formed, which surpasses all physiques in the world, and non-special forces cannot crush the forbidden body at all. If you have cultivated to the Forbidden Body, even if you are only half a step True Ancestor realm now, the top True Ancestor will not be able to kill you, and can only seal you!" the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said.

"What, the forbidden body is so terrifying!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He was very aware of the strength of the top true ancestor, and with his current strength, facing that kind of top true ancestor, he was afraid that he would still be killed in an instant.

But if he has a forbidden body, the top true ancestor can't kill him, what kind of concept is this?

Although it can be sealed, if the speed is fast enough and the means are enough, then there is no need to be afraid of the top true ancestor, and even as long as the Dao Ancestor does not make a move, he will not be afraid of everything.

"Master, is it dangerous?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Of course it's dangerous!" Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said solemnly: "To be honest, if you are a teacher in the realm of a half-step True Ancestor, I am afraid that there is no hope of success and you will fall here." But once you become a true ancestor, the power of the true ancestor is fixed, and there is no way to change it! The power of the true ancestor is actually the prototype of the Dao power, and once it is finalized, there is no way to change it at all. Therefore, you can only master the power of the dark taboo when you are in the realm of the half-step True Ancestor, and only when you become a true ancestor can you have the forbidden attribute! According to the teacher's calculations, in the Void Heaven line, no one else has hope, but you have hope. Although I don't know what way you can master the power of the dark taboo, I still brought you here. If you really can't help it, then don't try. Once you try it, you can't stop it!"

Ye Tian was silent and began to think about whether he should give it a try.

Suddenly, Ye Tian's eyes bloomed, and he affirmed: "Master, the disciple is willing to give it a try!"

"Are you sure?"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor asked.

"There is a certain certainty!" Ye Tian hurriedly said: "The disciple has a special talent, which can manifest a clone that is exactly the same as the main body, and he can use the clone instead of experimenting. "

"Doppelganger, is this going to work?"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was a little skeptical.

In his opinion, the doppelganger is not comparable to the ontology at all, the doppelganger is just the manifestation of power, in fact, it is not a real body at all, even if it is a special doppelganger, you can barely practice, but you still can't ban the ontology.

And this time the experiment is different, a little mistake will fall, replace the body with a clone, even if the doppelganger succeeds, the body is likely to die.

But as soon as Ye Tian's clone appeared, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was shocked.

"Exactly the same!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was sure that under his investigation, Ye Tian's clone was exactly the same as the main body, even down to the breath of every cell, the fluctuation of the law, the fluctuation of power, and the breath of the soul...... Everything is exactly the same, like a copy.

What kind of doppelganger is this?

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor wanted to ask such a question, but he didn't ask it, he knew that this was Ye Tian's secret, Ye Tian was able to tell him, this was already a lot of trust in him, and he naturally wouldn't delve too deep.

"You can give it a try!" the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor agreed.

Wow!

Ye Tian's copied body flew towards the black lotus.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor naturally didn't know, the copy of this copying talent was the same as the body, there was no difference, once this body successfully mastered the power of the dark taboo, that body could also master the power of the dark taboo.

There were lotus seeds on the black lotus, Ye Tian took out one, swallowed it in his mouth, and began to refine the lotus seeds.

Rumble!!!!

The lake of dark forbidden power surged, and a large amount of dark forbidden power poured into Ye Tian's body.

The tempering begins!

"Ahh!!!hh

The endless pain came in, very similar to the pain that Ye Tian had experienced when he had copied his talent, but the pain seemed to have increased a thousand times more.

If it weren't for Ye Tian's strong divine soul, his bearing capacity was far beyond before, otherwise he would have been unconscious or even shattered.

In this case, it is simply difficult to refine the power of the dark taboo.

"I'll go, it's so difficult, how did the Lord of the Forbidden Temple succeed?"

Ye Tian had enough reason to suspect that the Lord of the Forbidden Hall must have obtained some amazing inheritance or treasure before he could enter the power of the Dark Forbidden when he was in the half-step True Ancestor realm, find an initial realm, and then control the power of the Dark Forbidden Palace.

And he has nothing but himself!

It didn't take long!

Bang!

Ye Tian's body failed to control the power of the Dark Taboo, exploded, was swallowed by the power of the Dark Tabo, and fell!

"Failed!"

Ye Tian was not disappointed, but saw hope.

Because he has experience, the next time will definitely be better than this one.

"Master, this talent of mine can only be used once in 10,000 years, I need to enter the time acceleration environment and come out again after 10,000 years!"

Ye Tian said.

Immediately, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor personally arranged the Time Acceleration Array for Ye Tian, and personally manipulated the time to speed up by 100,000 times, so that Ye Tian spent 10,000 years in just over a month.

Coming out of the time-accelerated environment, Ye Tian once again copied his own body and started the second attempt!
